title: crash_info.c + lichen_l2.c: no crash_info hooks in lichen_l2.c
description:
Cross-file interaction gap: crash_info.c provides crash telemetry but lichen_l2.c has no calls to crash_info_store().

lora_l2.c:490 calls crash_info_store(CRASH_DRIVER_OVERFLOW, ...) for driver overflow.

lichen_l2.c has no crash_info_store() calls even though it has critical failure paths:
- Line 1879: 'RX returned oversized packet' - silently returns
- Line 962-974: TX frame build failed - returns error but no crash log
- Various NULL checks that LOG_ERR but don't record to crash_info

For debugging field failures, having lichen_l2.c failures recorded in retained RAM would help diagnose issues after watchdog reset.

P3: Not a correctness bug, but operational gap. Consider adding crash_info_store() for critical lichen_l2.c failures like:
- lichen_link_rx returning oversized output
- peer table corruption (line 703)
- rx_mutex timeout (line 1252)
